mechanics.excerpt: If the dependents are very young or infirm and/or tney are particularly vulnerable to predation (for exam: ple, they live alone on secluded farm, Or travel frequently with no escort), the trait is worth 2 points_ DIBABLED (multiple trait) Value: 1-3 character who is disabled suffers some form of affliction that limits him some way: The exact definition and effects of the disability are up to the player and the gamemaster: The point value of the disability is based on the amount of disability inflicted by this trait: 1-point disability limits the char- 81 [CRanium
